CVE-2022-25647.title: The package com.google.code.gson:gson before 2.8.9 are vulnerable ...
CVE-2022-25647.summary: The package com.google.code.gson:gson before 2.8.9 are vulnerable to Deserialization of Untrusted Data via the writeReplace() method in internal classes, which may lead to DoS attacks.
